Name: ComprehensiveMortgageRules
Description: Comprehensive rules library exercising every default formula method wrapper and comparison operator against the comprehensive-loan-application.xml MISMO document. Used by the Rule Service integration tests.

Categories.Name: 01 - Borrower Identity (Text Methods)
Categories.Description: Rules exercising LEFT, RIGHT, MID, UPPER, LOWER, PROPER, TRIM, CONCAT, REPLACE, SUBSTITUTE.

Categories.Name: 02 - Loan Terms (Numeric Methods)
Categories.Description: Rules exercising ROUND, ROUNDUP, INT, ABS, MIN, MAX, SUM, AVERAGE, POWER, CEILING, FLOOR.

Categories.Name: 03 - Logical & Conditional
Categories.Description: Rules exercising the IF method wrapper and nested method calls.

Categories.Name: 04 - Collections & Plain Comparisons
Categories.Description: Rules exercising collection counts and the full set of comparison operators without method wrappers.

Expressions.Name: Primary Borrower First Name Prefix
Expressions.Description: LEFT extracts the first 4 characters of the primary borrower's first name.

ResultDefinition.Message: Primary borrower first name begins with 'Marl'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Primary borrower first name begins with 'Marl'.

Expressions.Name: Primary Borrower Last Name Suffix
Expressions.Description: RIGHT extracts the last 4 characters of the primary borrower's last name.

ResultDefinition.Message: Primary borrower last name ends with 'bara'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Primary borrower last name ends with 'bara'.

Expressions.Name: Middle Name Inner Characters
Expressions.Description: MID extracts characters 2-4 from the primary borrower's middle name (Antonio).

ResultDefinition.Message: Middle name inner characters match 'nto'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Middle name inner characters match 'nto'.

Expressions.Name: Upper Case State Code
Expressions.Description: UPPER normalizes the subject property state code.

ResultDefinition.Message: Subject property is located in CA.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Subject property is located in CA.

Expressions.Name: Lower Case Last Name
Expressions.Description: LOWER converts the primary borrower's last name to lower case.

ResultDefinition.Message: Lower-cased last name matches 'rabara'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Lower-cased last name matches 'rabara'.

Expressions.Name: Proper Case City
Expressions.Description: PROPER title-cases the subject property city name.

ResultDefinition.Message: Property city normalizes to 'El Dorado Hills'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Property city normalizes to 'El Dorado Hills'.

Expressions.Name: Concatenated Full Name
Expressions.Description: CONCAT joins first and last name with a space.

ResultDefinition.Message: Full name concatenates to 'Marlon Rabara'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Full name concatenates to 'Marlon Rabara'.

Expressions.Name: Trimmed Last Name
Expressions.Description: TRIM removes surrounding whitespace before comparison.

ResultDefinition.Message: Trimmed last name matches 'Rabara'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Trimmed last name matches 'Rabara'.

Expressions.Name: Replace City Prefix
Expressions.Description: REPLACE swaps the first two characters of the city name.

ResultDefinition.Message: REPLACE rewrites the city prefix to 'Le Dorado Hills'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: REPLACE rewrites the city prefix to 'Le Dorado Hills'.

Expressions.Name: Substitute Hyphen In Loan Id
Expressions.Description: SUBSTITUTE replaces hyphens in the loan identifier with the letter X.

ResultDefinition.Message: Loan identifier hyphen replaced to produce 'LNX20002'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Loan identifier hyphen replaced to produce 'LNX20002'.

Expressions.Name: Rounded Note Rate
Expressions.Description: ROUND reduces the note rate to one decimal place.

ResultDefinition.Message: Note rate rounds to 6.4%.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Note rate rounds to 6.4%.

Expressions.Name: RoundUp Note Rate
Expressions.Description: ROUNDUP rounds the note rate up to two decimal places.

ResultDefinition.Message: Rounded-up note rate is at least 6.37%.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Rounded-up note rate is at least 6.37%.

Expressions.Name: Integer Loan Term Years
Expressions.Description: INT truncates the loan term expressed in years.

ResultDefinition.Message: Loan term equals 30 years.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Loan term equals 30 years.

Expressions.Name: Absolute Value Of Cash Difference
Expressions.Description: ABS yields the magnitude of the difference between purchase price and loan amount.

ResultDefinition.Message: Down payment magnitude equals 170000.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Down payment magnitude equals 170000.

Expressions.Name: Minimum Of Value And Cap
Expressions.Description: MIN selects the smaller of the property value and a conforming cap.

ResultDefinition.Message: Property value is at or above the 800000 cap.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Property value is at or above the 800000 cap.

Expressions.Name: Maximum Of Loan And Floor
Expressions.Description: MAX selects the larger of the requested loan amount and a floor.

ResultDefinition.Message: Requested loan amount exceeds the 500000 floor.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Requested loan amount exceeds the 500000 floor.

Expressions.Name: Sum Of Cash Components
Expressions.Description: SUM adds purchase price and closing costs.

ResultDefinition.Message: Purchase price plus closing costs equals 864500.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Purchase price plus closing costs equals 864500.

Expressions.Name: Average Of Note And Loan Amount
Expressions.Description: AVERAGE computes the mean of the note amount and requested loan amount.

ResultDefinition.Message: Average of note and loan amounts equals 680000.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Average of note and loan amounts equals 680000.

Expressions.Name: Power Threshold
Expressions.Description: POWER raises 10 to the 5th power and compares against a literal magnitude.

ResultDefinition.Message: 10^5 evaluates to 100000.

Expressions.ResultMessage: 10^5 evaluates to 100000.

Expressions.Name: Ceiling Of Note Rate
Expressions.Description: CEILING rounds the note rate up to the next whole number.

ResultDefinition.Message: Note rate ceiling equals 7.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Note rate ceiling equals 7.

Expressions.Name: Floor Of Note Rate
Expressions.Description: FLOOR rounds the note rate down to the previous whole number.

ResultDefinition.Message: Note rate floor equals 6.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Note rate floor equals 6.

Expressions.Name: Conditional High Balance Flag
Expressions.Description: IF returns the true-branch flag when the numeric condition is non-zero.

ResultDefinition.Message: Loan classified as high balance.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Loan classified as high balance.

Expressions.Name: Nested Max Of Method Results
Expressions.Description: MAX over two nested method results (ABS and ROUND) demonstrates innermost-first resolution.

ResultDefinition.Message: Nested MAX(ABS, ROUND) resolves to 700000.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Nested MAX(ABS, ROUND) resolves to 700000.

Expressions.Name: Conditional Method On Both Sides
Expressions.Description: A method call on both sides of the comparison must each resolve independently.

ResultDefinition.Message: Upper-cased first name matches the upper-cased literal.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Upper-cased first name matches the upper-cased literal.

Expressions.Name: Has Co-Borrower
Expressions.Description: Equality against the additional borrower count.

ResultDefinition.Message: Application includes exactly one co-borrower.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Application includes exactly one co-borrower.

Expressions.Name: Multiple Assets Present
Expressions.Description: Greater-than comparison against the asset count.

ResultDefinition.Message: Borrower discloses more than two assets.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Borrower discloses more than two assets.

Expressions.Name: Liability Count Within Limit
Expressions.Description: Less-than-or-equal comparison against the liability count.

ResultDefinition.Message: Liability count is within the review limit.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Liability count is within the review limit.

Expressions.Name: First Asset Value Threshold
Expressions.Description: Greater-than-or-equal comparison against an indexed asset value.

ResultDefinition.Message: Primary checking balance meets the reserve threshold.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Primary checking balance meets the reserve threshold.

Expressions.Name: Co-Borrower First Name
Expressions.Description: Indexed string equality against the additional borrower's first name.

ResultDefinition.Message: Co-borrower first name is 'Maria'.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Co-borrower first name is 'Maria'.

Expressions.Name: Loan Purpose Not Refinance
Expressions.Description: Inequality operator against the loan purpose enumeration.

ResultDefinition.Message: Loan purpose is not a refinance.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Loan purpose is not a refinance.

Expressions.Name: Conforming Loan And Single Unit
Expressions.Description: Logical AND combining a loan amount bound with a financed-unit check.

ResultDefinition.Message: Loan amount and unit count satisfy conforming criteria.

Expressions.ResultMessage: Loan amount and unit count satisfy conforming criteria.
